forager.agents

Class MadkitAgent

  • java.lang.Object
    • madkit.kernel.AbstractAgent
      • madkit.kernel.Agent
        • forager.agents.MadkitAgent
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AgentEntity, Serializable, Comparable<AbstractAgent>

    public final class MadkitAgent
extends Agent
implements AgentEntity
    MaDKit implementation of the AgentEntity for the Forager game.
    Author:
    Guillaume Desquesnes
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      First behavior of the agent.

      Return the list of messages recieved.

      Get the info on all the visible agents.

      Get the list of all the visible objects.

      Give a certain quantity of an item to an other agent from your inventory.

    • Constructor Detail

      • MadkitAgent

        public MadkitAgent(Environnement environnement,
           Brain brain)
        Create a new MaDKit agent at the (20,20) position.
        Parameters:
        environnement - The environnement he belongs on.
        brain - The brain of the agent.

      • MadkitAgent

        public MadkitAgent(Environnement environnement,
           Point pos,
           Brain brain)
        Create a new MaDKit agent.
        Parameters:
        environnement - The environnement he belongs on.
        pos - The position of the top left corner of the agent.
        brain - The brain of the agent.

    • Method Detail

      • activate

        protected void activate()
        First behavior of the agent. Request the default AGR community. Take the default role and his id role in the default group. Take the id role in his team group.
        Overrides:
        activate in class AbstractAgent

      • add

        public int add(String item,
      int weight)
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Add the item or a part of it in the inventory if it fit.
        Specified by:
        add in interface AgentEntity
        Parameters:
        item - The type of item to add, not null.
        weight - The quantity of item.
        Returns:
        The quantity of item added.

      • broadcast

        public void broadcast(MessageContent message)
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Broadcast a message to all the agents in range.

        If possible it should use the multiagents system way to communicate to handle the communication. Else the message will be added directly via recieveMessageFromOtherType

        Specified by:
        broadcast in interface AgentEntity
        Parameters:
        message - The message to broadcast, not null.

      • canHarvest

        public boolean canHarvest()
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Test if the agent is in position to harvest. Doesn't test if the agent has the capacity or the space to harvest.
        Specified by:
        canHarvest in interface AgentEntity
        Returns:
        True if the agent is in positon to harvest, else false.

      • collide

        public boolean collide(AgentEntity ae,
              Rectangle box)
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Test if an agent collide with a given hitbox.
        Specified by:
        collide in interface AgentEntity
        Parameters:
        ae - The agent.
        box - The hitbox.
        Returns:
        True if the agent collide, else false.

      • color

        public final Color color()
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Return the color of the agent. Used only by the UI.
        Specified by:
        color in interface AgentEntity
        Returns:
        The color of the agent.

      • copulate

        public boolean copulate(AgentInfo other)
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Try to create a child with the help of an other agent. Creating a child cost food/energy. The child will recieve half his conception cost of food/energy in his inventory.
        Specified by:
        copulate in interface AgentEntity
        Parameters:
        other - The other agent, not null.
        Returns:
        True if a child is born, else false.

      • createAgent

        public boolean createAgent(Point pos)
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Create an agent on a given location. The agent is created with half his conception cost of food/energy in his inventory.
        Specified by:
        createAgent in interface AgentEntity
        Parameters:
        pos - The location, not null.
        Returns:
        True if the agent has been created, else false.

        public final Vector2D direction()
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Return the current direction/orientation vector of the agent.
        Specified by:
        direction in interface AgentEntity
        Returns:
        The current direction/orientation vector of the agent.

       int quantity)

        Returns:
        The quantity of item droped.

      • eat

        public void eat(int quantity)
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Eat a certain quantity of food/energy. Decrease your hunger.
        Specified by:
        eat in interface AgentEntity
        Parameters:
        quantity - The quantity of food/energy to eat.

        Get an agent from its info.

        Returns:
        The agent if it exist in the environnement, else null.

        public List<FixedObject> getVisibleObjects()

        Returns:
        The list of all the visible objects.

      • give

        public void give(AgentInfo ai,
        String item,
        int quantity)
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Give a certain quantity of an item to an other agent from your inventory. Works by sending a RessourceMessage to the other agent. If you give too much, you'll get back what the other can't store.
        Specified by:
        give in interface AgentEntity
        Parameters:
        ai - The other agent, not null.
        item - The item type, not null.
        quantity - The quantity of item to give.

      • handleMessage

        public void handleMessage()
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Preprocess the message recieved.

        The RessourceMessage will be added to the inventory and if there is too much it's automaticaly send back.

        Specified by:
        handleMessage in interface AgentEntity

      • harvest

        public final int harvest(String type)
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Harvest the maximum ressource of this type who collide with the entity.
        Specified by:
        harvest in interface AgentEntity
        Parameters:
        type - The type of ressource.
        Returns:
        The quantity of ressource harvested.

        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Test if a message has been recieved.

        haveMessage in interface AgentEntity
        Returns:

      • isMessage

        public boolean isMessage(MessageContent message)
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Test if the message has been recieved. Used to verify that the brain doesn't forge fake message.
        Specified by:
        isMessage in interface AgentEntity
        Parameters:
        message - The message.
        Returns:
        True if the message has been recieved, else false.

      • live

        protected void live()
        Main behavior of the agent. Call update every 6 ms.
        Overrides:
        live in class Agent

      • moveBy

        public final Vector2D moveBy(Vector2D mvment)
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Move the agent according to a vector. The vector norm will be reduce to 1, if it is higher.
        Specified by:
        moveBy in interface AgentEntity
        Parameters:
        mvment - The vector of movement, not null.
        Returns:
        The effective movement vector.

      • recieveMessageFromOtherType

        public void recieveMessageFromOtherType(MessageContent message)
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Recieve a message from an incompatible multiagents system.
        Specified by:
        recieveMessageFromOtherType in interface AgentEntity
        Parameters:
        message - The message, not null.

      • sendMessage

        public void sendMessage(MessageContent message,
               AgentInfo ai)
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Send a message to an other agent.

        If possible it should use the multiagents system way to communicate to handle the communication. Else the message will be added directly via recieveMessageFromOtherType

        Specified by:
        sendMessage in interface AgentEntity
        Parameters:
        message - The message, not null.
        ai - The agent information, not null.

        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Return the team of the agent.

        Specified by:
        team in interface AgentEntity
        Returns:
        The team of the agent.

      • update

        public void update()
        Description copied from interface: AgentEntity
        Update the agent. It must call once increaseHunger and Brain.update()
        Specified by:
        update in interface AgentEntity
